description: Benchmark tests for spec-drafter skill - assists in creating OpenSpec proposal.md documents for Phase A.1

evals.name: level-judgment
evals.prompt: 判断规范等级: 用户请求 '修复登录页面一个 typo'

assertions.name: judges_level_1
assertions.description: Should judge as Level 1 (Skip) for trivial fix

assertions.name: explains_reasoning
assertions.description: Should explain why Level 1 was chosen

evals.name: proposal-generation
evals.prompt: 生成 proposal.md: 为用户认证功能 (登录/注册/密码重置) 创建 OpenSpec proposal

assertions.name: has_required_sections
assertions.description: Should include Background, Scope, and Goals sections

assertions.name: covers_all_features
assertions.description: Should cover login, register, and password reset in the proposal

evals.name: scope-extraction
evals.prompt: 提取范围: '我们需要给用户添加一个通知系统，支持邮件和短信，但不包括推送通知'

assertions.name: extracts_in_scope
assertions.description: Should extract email and SMS as in-scope

assertions.name: extracts_out_of_scope
assertions.description: Should extract push notifications as out-of-scope

assertions.name: uses_scope_format
assertions.check: output.includes('In-Scope') || output.includes('Out-of-Scope') || output.includes('范围内') || output.includes('范围外')

evals.name: template-compliance
evals.prompt: 验证模板合规性: 检查生成的 proposal.md 是否遵循 OpenSpec Level 2 模板格式

assertions.name: has_all_required_sections
assertions.description: Should have all Level 2 required sections

assertions.name: correct_heading_hierarchy
assertions.description: Should use correct H2 headings for major sections
assertions.check: output.includes('## Background') || output.includes('## Scope') || output.includes('## Goal')

assertions.name: has_metadata_header
assertions.description: Should include proposal metadata (version, date, status)

evals.name: bilingual-support
evals.prompt: 双语输入处理: 'Add a dark mode feature / 添加深色模式功能' — 请生成英文 proposal

assertions.name: handles_mixed_input
assertions.description: Should correctly parse mixed Chinese/English input
assertions.check: output.includes('dark mode') || output.includes('Dark Mode') || output.includes('深色模式')

assertions.name: generates_english_output
assertions.description: Should generate proposal content in English as requested

assertions.name: preserves_intent
assertions.description: Should preserve the feature intent from both language inputs
